返回日报
Hacker News #8

西班牙下令将帕兰提尔公司列入公私企业黑名单

Spain Orders Blacklist of Palantir from Public and Private Companies

AI 作者 mgh2 热度 730 回复 302 2026/07/02 23:02
打开原帖 打开外部链接 JSON

摘要

  • The Spanish government has commenced issuing directives to state-controlled entities to blacklist U.S. data analytics firm Palantir Technologies.The decision stems directly from growing official concern over the potential misuse of classified information linked to national security.Moncloa has instructed companies overseen by the State Society of Industrial Participations (SEPI) to halt future contracting with the Miami-based artificial intelligence and data analysis multinational.The directive impacts major entities responsible for high-level state communications and military intelligence, including Telefónica, Indra, and the military shipbuilder Navantia.National Sovereignty ConcernsAccording to corporate board sources, the prime minister's office communicated the ban to listed companies to prevent any contracts that could jeopardize Spanish national sovereignty.The political intervention has already disrupted advanced procurement pipelines, including a near-finalized project with Navantia and a negotiated collaboration agreement with the Guardia Civil that was vetoed by Interior Minister Fernando Grande-Marlaska.The restrictions mirror recent regulatory and political pushback against Palantir elsewhere in Europe.Former French Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu announced on June 10 that France would cease working with the firm, while German cyberdefense authorities and secret services have increasingly favored European alternatives like the French competitor ChaosVision.Defense Procurement DeadlockDespite the broader public and private sector blacklist, Palantir continues to maintain active contracts with the Spanish Ministry of Defense.The firm holds a €16.5 million contract signed in 2023 with the Armed Forces Intelligence Center (CIFAS), which is scheduled to expire this upcoming November.Military leadership, including the Chiefs of Staff of the Army and Navy, has lobbied Defense Minister Margarita Robles to renew the contract, citing the platform's operational superiority.However, Moncloa has yet to make an official determination regarding the defense contract extension as the expiration date approaches.Geopolitical Friction and Domestic AlternativesThe domestic blacklist coincides with sharp geopolitical tension between Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez and the incoming U.S. administration.Palantir founders Peter Thiel and CEO Alex Karp have deep financial and political ties to Donald Trump, whose political platform conflicts directly with the diplomatic positions maintained by Madrid.In response to the perceived risks of relying on foreign defense software, Spain is accelerating funding for domestic technology platforms to preserve national data sovereignty.The executive recently approved an €115 million investment in the Catalan firm Openchip, part of a broader €5 billion state-backed gigafactory project, financed largely by SEPI Digital.

命中 1 个 AI/科技关键词。

正文翻译

暂无正文

暂无原文

milanito1985 2026/07/03 02:12
西班牙确实走在正确的道路上，我很好奇为什么没有其他国家从他们的做法中汲取灵感
Spain is really going in the right direction, I wonder why no one countries inspire from what they are doing
楼层
fodmap 2026/07/03 02:32
我确实同意封杀Palantir是个明智之举，但西班牙政府这么做的原因却不对。西班牙正将各种数据存储在中国服务器上，包括他们的情报和司法监听数据。

https://www.politico.eu/article/spain-huawei-contract-judici...

I do agree blocking Palantir is a good move but the Spanish government is doing it for the wrong reason. Spain is storing all sort of data on Chinese servers, including their Intelligence, and Judicial wiretaps.

https://www.politico.eu/article/spain-huawei-contract-judici...

楼层
athrowaway3z 2026/07/03 03:06
这确实令人不安，但下面这段话让我笑出了声：

> 巴特·格罗特胡伊斯表示，西班牙“犯了一个大错”……“西班牙现在依赖于那个对我们发动最大规模、最复杂进攻性间谍活动的国家。”

我严重怀疑他是否天真到相信“针对我们”这个限定词能让有史以来最大规模、最复杂的进攻性间谍活动的实施者免责。

That is rather disturbing but this had me lol:

> Spain is “making a big mistake,” said Bart Groothuis [...] “Spain is now dependent on the country with the largest and most sophisticated offensive espionage program directed against us.”

I highly doubt he's naive enough to believe the "against us" qualifier exempts the operator of the largest and most sophisticated offensive espionage program ever.

8note 2026/07/03 10:30
间谍活动可比武力征服好得多。

美国大张旗鼓地公开宣布有意吞并格陵兰和加拿大，这真是彻底搞砸了

espionage is a lot less bad than conquering by force.

the US properly fucked up by very publicly declaring intent to conquer greenland and canada

楼层
wodenokoto 2026/07/03 10:20
现在你要么把数据交给中国，要么交给美国。

中国并没有公开威胁要入侵欧盟。

我认为欧盟需要自己研发这项技术，但目前他们做不到，而且他们也没有任何庞大且值得信赖的盟友。

Right now you either give it to China or to the US.

China is not publicly threatening to invade the EU.

I think the EU needs to produce this themselves but right now they don’t and they don’t have any large, trustworthy allies.

ascotan 2026/07/03 11:02
所以……把你们的数据交给中国，就为了气一气那个“橙人”。是啊，真是绝妙的举措。
so.. hand over your data to china to spite orange man. yes excellent move.

ifwinterco 2026/07/03 13:00
这不是为了赌气，而是出于逻辑——美国/以色列是公认的恶劣行为体。

中国可能也不怎么样，但目前没有证据表明他们和美国/以色列一样恶劣

It’s not spite it’s just logical - US/Israel are a known bad actor.

China is also probably bad, but currently there’s no evidence they’re as bad as US/Israel

GuestFAUniverse 2026/07/03 14:31
中国正在向俄罗斯提供援助，而俄罗斯正在攻击一个欧洲国家。

因此，在我看来，这种说法纯属扯淡。

中国就是一个披着熊猫外衣的敌人。

China is supplying Russia, which is attacking an European country.

Thus, from my POV that sentiment is BS.

China is an adversary in a panda costume.

楼层
ifwinterco 2026/07/03 15:04
而且以色列还在攻击各个国家——好吧，虽然不在欧洲本土，但非常靠近欧盟东南成员国。

所以你看，有一个国家与一个正在攻击欧盟周边国家的国家结成了非常松散的同盟，而另一个国家则与一个正在攻击欧盟周边稍远一点国家的国家紧密捆绑。

这实在算不上是对美国的响亮背书。

And Israel is attacking various countries - okay not in quite in Europe, but pretty close to the southeastern EU member states.

So you have one country which is in a very loose alliance with a country that's attacking a country around the periphery of the EU, and another country that's joined at the hip with a country that's attacking another country around the periphery of the EU, just slightly further away.

It's not exactly a ringing endorsement of the US

pvaldes 2026/07/03 16:36
别被骗了。以色列也在攻击欧洲国家

比如他们干涉苏格兰和欧洲选举被抓现行。欧洲人选谁根本不是以色列的事。而且有充分理由怀疑，他们几十年来一直安插性陷阱来敲诈欧洲左右翼精英。这可不是真正朋友该有的做派。

Don't be fooled. Israel is also attacking countries in Europe

They did when being caught messing with elections in Scotland, Europe, for example. Whom Europeans vote are none of the Israel business. And there is a reasonable suspicion that they were sending sex traps for decades to blackmail European elites, left and right. This is not how a real friend behave.

楼层
red-iron-pine 2026/07/03 22:48
以色列已陷入绝境，需要利用一切优势，因为他们周围的每一个人都恨他们。

他们靠着美国国会和欧洲的几个爪牙，要是这些靠山没了，他们就死定了

Israel has its back to the wall and needs every advantage, since literally everyone else around them hates them.

they have the US congress and a few cats-paws in Europe, and if that runs out, they die

楼层
danudey 2026/07/04 06:27
大家恨他们的原因在于，他们几十年来一直在实施种族灭绝，并拒绝任何形式的和平进程。他们周围的所有国家都曾提出保障以色列的安全，条件仅仅是让巴勒斯坦人免受压迫地生活，但以色列不愿放弃其掠夺土地的行径，因为“所有人都想毁灭我们”这种说辞正是右翼维持执政地位、让民众对一切视而不见的借口。

甚至美国最近也担心，以色列不仅计划破坏与伊朗的和平谈判，还企图暗杀伊朗代表：

https://www.israelnationalnews.com/news/429561

以色列之所以陷入绝境，唯一的原因就是他们把“绝不让悲剧重演”的态度泛化到了任何非军事手段解决问题的理念上，而且仗着有美国撑腰，他们迄今为止得以肆意妄为、逃避一切后果。这就好比一个混蛋小弟弟，仗着大哥会替你出头，有恃无恐地胡作非为。

如果以色列真心想与邻国和平共处，那也许他们能做到，但他们要么只想要通过胜利换来的和平，要么如果和平意味着放弃继续对巴勒斯坦进行种族清洗以建立更多定居点的能力，他们就不想要和平，又或者他们想要和平，却不相信其他人也想要和平（尽管除了他们之外，所有人都在努力推动和平）。

如果过去70年里他们没有那么热衷于侵略、种族灭绝和种族隔离，也许这一切早就解决了，但他们那种自诩为西亚/北非唯一民主自由堡垒、因此所有人都想毁灭他们的说辞，根本经不起哪怕是最基本的推敲。

The reason everyone hates them is that they've been committing genocide for decades and have refused any sort of peace process. All the countries around them have offered to guarantee Israel's security in exchange for just letting the Palestians live their lives free of oppression but Israel is not willing to give up its land grab because the narrative that 'everyone is trying to destroy us' is what keeps the right wing in power and allows the population to look the other way.

Even the US was concerned recently that Israel was planning not just to sabotage the peace talks with Iran but to assassinate the Iranian representatives:

https://www.israelnationalnews.com/news/429561

The only reason Israel has its back to the wall is that its 'never again' attitude has extended to any concept of solving problems that doesn't involve military force, and since they've had the backing of the US that means they've been able to get away with anything they wanted so far. It's the asshole little brother whose big brother will beat you up if he ever runs the risk of facing the consequences of his actions.

If Israel had any desire to live in peace with their neighbors then maybe they would, but either they don't want peace except through victory, they don't want peace if it means giving up the ability to continue their ethnic cleansing of Palestine to build more settlements, or they want peace but they don't believe that anyone else wants it (despite everyone else trying to work towards it except them).

If they hadn't been so focused on aggression, genocide, and apartheid for the past 70 years maybe this all could have been solved, but the narrative that they're the only bastion of democracy and freedom in West Asia/North Africa and that's why everyone wants to destroy them doesn't hold up to the barest of scrutiny.

wafflemaker 2026/07/03 16:04

你指的可能是朝鲜吧？

China is also supplying Ukraine and the countries that supply Ukraine.

楼层
tancop 2026/07/03 18:48
中国在境外没有任何政治议程（从他们的视角来看，这也包括台湾）。他们关心的只是在国内维持执政地位和发展经济。他们之所以向俄罗斯出售商品，只是因为这是赚钱的好办法。

一带一路、与非洲独裁者做交易、向欧洲出售汽车和手机、Temu和阿里巴巴、开源大语言模型，所有这些都是为了增加税收。很多中国企业是国有或国有控股的，所以这也是直接惠及政府的另一种方式。

就连那些非法警务站的存在，也只是为了确保海外华人社区不支持国内的反对运动。这是好事吗？绝对不是，但这对整个东道国也构不成威胁。

他们搞的间谍活动，要么是造福世界的经济间谍活动（商业秘密本就不该存在，那是专利该干的事），要么就是像其他国家一样搞的老一套国家间情报行动。我敢打赌，俄罗斯和美国在欧洲的间谍都比中国多。

china has no political agenda outside of their country (that includes taiwan from their pov). all they care about is staying in power at home and keeping up the economy. they only sell to russia because its a good way to make money.

belt and road, deals with african dictators, selling cars and phones to europe, temu and alibaba, open source llms, all of that is for higher tax revenue. a lot of chinese companies are part state owned so thats another way it directly benefits the government.

even the illegal police stations only exist to make sure overseas chinese communities dont support opposition movements back home. is it a good thing? definitely not, but its also not a threat to the host country as a whole.

the spying they do is either economic espionage thats good for the world (trade secrets should not exist, thats what patents are for) or good old state on state action like everybody else is doing. i bet russia and america each have more spies in europe than china.

楼层
barrenko 2026/07/03 19:07
中国精英阶层产能过剩，除了以其他手段发动战争之外，别无他因。当认为有必要时，他们曾采取过对澳大利亚实施海上封锁等行动来展示武力。

欧洲已被榨干，如果现状不改变，很快就会不复存在。

There is no reason for chinese elite overproduction other than to wage war by other means. They performed acts such as naval blockade of Australia as a show of force when such a thing was deemed necessary.

Europe is bled dry and will cease to exist rather soon if nothing chnages.

楼层
JohnTHaller 2026/07/03 21:05
除了那些更为人熟知的事情之外，中国在2015年对GitHub发动了DDoS攻击，原因是他们恼火于有两个项目让中国公民能够阅读非宣传性质的新闻。
In addition to the more well-known stuff, China DDoSed Github because they were mad that two projects let Chinese citizens read non-propaganda news in 2015.

red-iron-pine 2026/07/03 22:47
更别提所有的黑客攻击和工业间谍活动了，比如“盐台风”行动

咱们把话说清楚：MAGA正按照杜根式的剧本，竭尽所能地破坏美欧关系，但也别哪怕有一秒钟把中国幻想成什么维护人权或公平、良性竞争的神奇堡垒。

except for all of the hacking and industrial espionage, e.g. Salt Typhoon

let's be clear: MAGA is doing everything they can per Dugan-esque playbooks on how to destroy US-EU relations, but don't pretend for a second that China is some magical bastion of human rights or fair, competitive practices.
